description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Bee-hive Lite 1.2 and earlier, when register_globals is enabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the (1) header parameter to (a) conad/include/rootGui.inc.php and (b) include/rootGui.inc.php; (2) mysqlCall parameter to (c) conad/changeEmail.inc.php, (d) conad/changeUserDetails.inc.php, (e) conad/checkPasswd.inc.php, (f) conad/login.inc.php and (g) conad/logout.inc.php; (3) mysqlcall parameter to (h) include/listall.inc.php; (4) prefix parameter to (i) show/index.php; and (5) config parameter to (j) conad/include/mysqlCall.inc.php.
